name: Linear
description: Issue tracking and project management tool with a GraphQL API, webhooks, and SDKs for automation and integrations.

auth_methods.note: Official docs state support for OAuth 2.0 (for apps) and personal API tokens used as Bearer tokens. 'api_key' and 'token' are represented by personal API tokens; OAuth2 uses access/refresh tokens.

credential_access.note: Docs show personal API tokens can be created from a user's Linear account settings; OAuth apps can be registered to obtain client ID/secret. These are self-serve for users (no partner gating indicated).

api_surface.note: Official GraphQL API covers many product objects (teams, issues, projects, cycles, users, comments, labels, states, attachments, etc.). SDKs wrap the GraphQL API and webhooks are available as well.

buildability.note: Developer docs plus self-serve personal API tokens and OAuth app registration exist, so integrations can be built today. SDKs and GraphQL explorer further ease development.

queries: Linear GraphQL API authentication personal API tokens
